steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0007, t0011, t0012, t0046 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure and initial files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: paper corpus and Poleg-Polsky 2016 already exhaustively reviewed in t0046.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information needed; ModelDB release and supplementary covered by t0046.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0046's run_simplerun.py and build_cell.py for the synapse-list pattern; identify _ref_g handles for bipNMDA, bipampa, SACinhib MOD models.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the conductance-recording wrapper, gNMDA sweep, and noise-tail extension.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local CPU only; no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement conductance-recording wrapper, run gNMDA sweep + extended noise sweep, populate the answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: validation task; out-of-the-box analysis not in scope (paper-vs-deposited-code comparison only).

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (multi-variant), costs.json, remote_machines_used.json; render charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare per-synapse conductances and DSI-vs-gNMDA against Poleg-Polsky 2016 Fig 3A-F targets.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on conductance-balance findings and DSI-vs-gNMDA outcome.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed, prepare PR.
